name: EBF Portfolio Comparison
description: EBF portfolio messy roll-up by pillar, confidence, and evidence maturity. This dashboard is not a farm ranking.

cards.name: EBF Portfolio Messy Rollup
cards.description: Cross-farm EBF pillar roll-up with caveats against farm ranking.

native.query:
SELECT
  pillar_name,
  location_count,
  scorecard_count,
  avg_score,
  high_confidence_count,
  moderate_confidence_count,
  low_confidence_count,
  insufficient_evidence_count,
  latest_evidence_linked_at,
  caveat
FROM v_public_ebf_pillar_summary
ORDER BY pillar_name;
